subject: Larvitar — a small bipedal rock-type Pokémon with a dark green pupa-like carapace, rust-red triangular spikes along its back and head, and two red triangular eyes; depicted standing on a paved garden walkway in front of a brick planter of flowers
description: A small, stout Larvitar stands in three-quarter view on a paved stone walkway. Its body is a dark teal-green carapace shaped like a pupa or seed, with rust-red triangular spikes running down its head and back. Two narrow red triangular eyes look out across the scene. Behind the creature, a low brick planter wall holds clusters of warm pink-red and yellow flowers with soft green foliage. The lighting is warm and even — clearly a sunny outdoor garden or park setting. Composition is full-figure but tightly framed; the creature occupies center frame with the floral planter as the backdrop.
foreground: Larvitar standing on paved stone walkway
background: brick planter wall with pink-red and yellow flowers and green foliage
emotion: calm, slightly wary; alert but unaggressive body posture
